title: Opinion | Not Just Technology, But Transformation: What The Delhi AI Summit Signifies
description: The AI Summit in Delhi was not about machines alone. It was about preparing a society, curious, cautious and ambitious to harness intelligence in all its forms for human betterment

title: AI edtech startup Arivihan in talks to raise $10–12 million from Accel, Prosus
description: The proposed round comes within a year of its previous fundraise led by the same investors, as venture firms begin selectively backing AI-driven education startups amid an uneven recovery in the sector.

title: IMF’s Georgieva Backs India’s AI Path, Stresses Guardrails In Global AI Race
description: Business Today's Group Editor, Siddharth Zarabi in exclusive conversation with IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva endorsed India’s approach to artificial intelligence, calling it the “right way” for a country like India. She highlighted India’s investment in digital public infrastructure, including digital ID for 1.4 billion people, as a strong foundation for democratizing AI. Rather than copying high-tech corporate models, India is building sector-specific AI applications for healthcare, education, and public services. Georgieva said this approach could be more relevant for the developing world. However, she stressed the urgent need for global guardrails to ensure AI protects human dignity and rights. With AI potentially lifting global growth by 0.8%, she urged nations to collaborate responsibly in an increasingly fragmented world.

title: AI Posters: Galloping into Year of Horse with childhood dreams
description: What happens when childhood imagination meets the magic of AI?As we celebrate the Chinese New Year, we've reimagined the beloved toys from our early years. Here's to galloping into the Year of the Horse with wonder, creativity, and dreams!Produced by Xinhua Global Service
